name: Pease Golf Course
about: Pease Golf Course operates a golf simulator venue with a strong focus on year-round play, featuring aboutGolf PGA Tour Simulators. The venue offers 27 holes of traditional golf when in season but primarily serves as a golf simulator center during winter months, with bays available 7 days a week. The facility includes a full-service restaurant (Grill 28), pro shop, and hosts various leagues, tournaments, and events. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, offering coaching, club fitting services, and simulator leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Only PGA Tour simulator of its kind in northern New England
Year-round play with 27-hole traditional and simulator options
On-site restaurant and bar for post-game dining and socializing
Regular tournaments and leagues with competitive and social formats
Professional coaching services and club fitting available

food_and_drink.notes: Grill 28 serves breakfast, lunch and dinner with American and Mediterranean influences
Local beer and international wine available at Grill 28

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulation system, the only PGA Tour simulator of its kind in northern New England

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players are expected to bring their own golf clubs for simulator sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar (Grill 28) where food and drinks can be purchased, though bringing outside items isn't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing for 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf lessons and caters to families with various activities and programming.
